title: Miracle-Gro All Purpose water Soluble Plant Food, 1 kg
features: The number one selling plant food, trusted by gardeners nationwide
Grows plants twice as big as unfed plants
Grows beautiful, healthy plants with more blooms
For displays feed every two weeks from march to September
Simply dissolve in water and apply using a watering can or use a Miracle-Gro hose-end feeder
description: From the manufacturer Previous page Grows plants twice as big Feed your plants the nutrients they need to grow twice as big (versus unfed plants)! Unique blend of 10 nutrients The perfect blend of 10 nutrients and minerals that ensure your plants grow beautiful and bountiful. For healthier, happier plants Strengthening plant roots from the ground up means they can absorb more nutrients and minerals. Pet and child friendly Suitable for use as directed in areas where children and pets have access. Next page 1 Grows Twice As Big 2 Blend of 10 Nutrients 3 Healthier, Happier Plants 4 Pet & Child Friendly The number 1 best-selling plant food in the UK Miracle-Gro’s famous plant food is renowned for its game-changing ‘grows twice as big’ results. Our unique formula includes ten micronutrients designed to create maximum growth. For bountiful, glorious plants and flowers simply apply fortnightly and see extraordinary results right in front of your eyes. So easy to use, simply dilute and feed every two weeks for healthier, happier plants. Why should I use Miracle-Gro All Purpose Soluble Plant Food? Plants need more than just water, they need the right balance of essential nutrients to grow and bloom their best. Miracle-Gro feeds your plants the nutrients they need that are ​easily absorbed to grow your plants twice as big versus unfed plants! Where can I use Miracle-Gro All Purpose Soluble Plant Food? Perfect for pots and containers, hanging baskets, beds and borders. Miracle-Gro All Purpose Soluble Plant Food can be used indoors and outdoors. Suitable for use as directed in areas where children and pets have access. When should I use Miracle-Gro All Purpose Soluble Plant Food? For outdoor plants, use Miracle-Gro All Purpose Soluble Plant Food between March and September, when plants are actively growing. For indoor plants, can be used all year round when plants are actively growing. How do I use Miracle-Gro All Purpose Soluble Plant Food? Refer to pack for dosage size to dissolve in water, depending on plants type. Soak the soil around the plant base and wet the leaves with with a fine rose on a water can. Feed every 2 weeks when plants are actively growing. Can I use Miracle-Gro All Purpose Soluble Plant Food on my vegetables? Yes, feed every 2 weeks at the recommended rate and wash the vegetables before use. There is no health hazard associated with this type of product, which is a straightforward mixture of plant nutrients. product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Always follow the directions for use. Keep out of reach of children and pets. Avoid contact with skin and eyes. Do not ingest. Store in a cool, dry place. Use only as directed. Do not apply to edible plants intended for human consumption.
